title: method_implementation_catalog
description: Executable implementation catalog: maps abstract methods to language-specific code templates. Separate from method definitions to maintain the principle that methods know nothing about implementation. The callTemplate uses the same <role> placeholders as formula.generic_expression.

version.description: Semantic version of the implementation catalog

implementations.description: Method OID → array of implementations. Each method can have implementations in multiple languages.

MethodImplementation.description: An executable implementation of a method in a specific language/platform. The callTemplate uses <role> placeholders matching the method's input_roles names.

methodOid.description: OID of the method this implements (e.g. M.ANCOVA, M.PairedTTest)

package.description: Package or library name (e.g. stats, mmrm, scipy.stats, SAS/STAT)

procedure.description: SAS procedure name (e.g. PROC TTEST, PROC MIXED). Null for non-SAS languages.

function.description: Function name (e.g. t.test, lmer, ttest_ind). Null for SAS procedure-based implementations.

callTemplate.description: Template call using <role> placeholders from the method's input_roles. The transformation resolves roles to concepts, the study resolves concepts to variables, and the code engine substitutes. When a role has multiple bindings (e.g. multiple fixed_effects), they are expanded using roleSeparator.

roleSeparator.description: Separator used when expanding a <role> placeholder that resolves to multiple variables. R formula syntax uses ' + ' (default), SAS statement syntax uses ' ' (space).

outputMapping.description: How method output_classes map to language-specific output extraction

configurations.description: Language-specific configuration defaults (e.g. SAS options, R arguments)

OutputMapping.description: Maps a method output_class to language-specific output extraction. Tells the code engine how to capture structured results from the language's output objects.

outputClass.description: Name of the method output_class this maps (e.g. ls_means, type3_tests, test_result)

extractionCode.description: Language-specific code to extract this output class from the model result (e.g. emmeans(model, specs = ~<fixed_effect>))

resultColumns.description: Maps method statistic names to language-specific column names in the output (e.g. { estimate: 'emmean', SE: 'SE', CI_lower: 'lower.CL' })
